query:
-- Test Öğrencileri Oluştur
INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, password, role, age_group, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES 
  ('test-student-1', 'Test Öğrenci 1 (14-17)', 'test.ogrenci1@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'student', '14-17', 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('test-student-2', 'Test Öğrenci 2 (18-21)', 'test.ogrenci2@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'student', '18-21', 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('test-student-3', 'Test Öğrenci 3 (22-24)', 'test.ogrenci3@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'student', '22-24', 'pending', NOW(), NOW());

-- Test Mentor Oluştur
INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, password, role, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES 
  ('test-mentor-1', 'Test Mentor', 'test.mentor@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'mentor', 'active', NOW(), NOW());

-- Test Öğrencilerine Mentor Ata
UPDATE users SET mentor_id = 'test-mentor-1' WHERE id IN ('test-student-1', 'test-student-2', 'test-student-3');
